error_signature: element not recognizing in overflow container
title: Element not recognized in overflow container
symptom: The JavaScript code fails to recognize the chat box element when trying to scroll to the bottom of the container.
applies_when: Using a chat app with an overflow container
Trying to scroll to the last element
not_this_if: Element is correctly recognized in the DOM
root_cause: The initial JavaScript code used to select the element may not be compatible with the WeWeb environment, leading to failure in recognizing the element within the overflow container.
fix_steps: Use the WeWeb library to access the document
Select the correct element by its ID
Call the scrollIntoView method on the last child element
agent_instruction: Use the provided code snippet to scroll to the bottom of the chat container.
